addition.item: Install script write namne+version and changelog to language file for use in module config

language.item: Updates and changes are only made to en-GB using prefix XBIC_

note.item: xbSimple-iCal is based on Simple iCal Block by A.H.C. Waasdorp. Original project on GitHub
for Documentation see tab on Module Config page and README.md file on GitHub
Not listed on JED
Raise bugs and feature requests on GitHub

addition.item: new rrule2text() function in Helper to parse repeat rules to text
new int2ordstr() function in Helper to return 1st 12th 23rd etc
new iso8601toStr() function in Helper to conver ISO8601 format date to formatted string

remove.item: remove sanitize_html_clss() and ..._class() from Helper and replaced with improved sanitize_html_str()

change.item: Replaced language prefix to XBIC_ from XBSICAL_

language.item: Updates and changes are only made to en-GB using prefix XBIC_

note.item: xbSimple-iCal is based on Simple iCal Block by A.H.C. Waasdorp. Original project on GitHub
for Documentation see tab on Module Config page and README.md file on GitHub
Not listed on JED
Raise bugs and feature requests on GitHub

addition.item: New option for classes to apply to event categories by name
CSS for labels and label colours

language.item: Updates and changes are only made to en-GB using prefix XBSICAL_

note.item: xbSimple-iCal is based on Simple iCal Block by A.H.C. Waasdorp. Original project on GitHub
for Documentation see tab on Module Config page and README.md file on GitHub
Not listed on JED
Raise bugs and feature requests on GitHub

addition.item: Config Layout fieldset added options for sections of event display
Config CSS Styles fieldset added with options for classes and styles
Convert urls in description to links to new tab and with hostname only as link text

fix.item: bug in default tmpl line 108 double quote->single quote error if ical category set

language.item: Updates and changes are only made to en-GB using prefix XBSICAL_

for Documentation see tab on Module Config page and README.md file on GitHub
